channel.title: Jiadong's Blog
channel.description: 科学与人文，天文学研究生，艺术和技术，白日梦 | 李佳东，Tech & Writer, Astronomer，Dreamer | 这里是 @Jousdon 的个人博客.

item.title: Notes of Xiang et al. 2018
item.description:
3D stellar mass distribution of the Galactic disk

Data: 0.93 million main-sequence turnoff and subgiant stars from LAMOST surveys.

Abstract Results:

  1. All stellar populations younger than 10 Gyr exhibit strong disk flaring.
  2. Asymmetries and wave-like oscillations are presented in both the radial and vertical direction, with strength varying with stellar populations.
  3. Determined midplane stellar mass density raises doubts on the current estimate of local dark matter density.
  4. The radial distribution of surface mass density yields a disk scale length evolving from ∼4 kpc for the young populations to ∼2 kpc for the old populations.
  5. The disk has a peak star formation rate (SFR) changing from 6–8 Gyr ago at the inner part to 4–6 Gyr ago at the outer part, indicating an inside-out assemblage history. The 0–1 Gyr population yields a recent disk total SFR of $1.96 \pm 0.12 M_{\odot} yr^{-1}$.

Data

0.93 million stars selected in the $T_{eff}-M_V$ diagram out of 4.5 million stars observed by the LAMOST Galactic surveys.

Parameterization

Matching stellar paraters with $Y^2$ isochrones using a. Bayesian method.

$T_{eff}$, $M_G$, [Fe/H] (Z), [$\alpha$/Fe] $\rightarrow$ stellar mass ($M$), age ($\tau$)

Methodology

The stellar mass function in a given volume of the Galactic disk is a combined result of in situ

  • star formation & stellar evolution
  • stellar migration.

At any given position (with limited volume) of the disk number distribution $P(l, b, d)$ as a function of $M$, $Z$, and age $\tau$.

where $N_{in}$ represents stars formed in situ and $N_k$ represents stars that have migrated to their current position owing to a kinematic process.

$\psi$: SFH, $\phi$: chemical enrichment history, $\xi$: stellar IMF,

Hence $K_{P’ \rightarrow P }(M_{ini},Z,\tau)$ describes a a function to describe the probability that stars migrated from $P′(l′, b′, d′)$ to $P(l, b, d)$.

Assumptions

  • the IMF is universal across the Galactic disk, not sensitively depending on $Z$ in the disk volume.
  • stellar migration due to a kinematic process does not prefer special stellar mass, so that the kinematic term in Equation is a constant function of stellar mass.

So for a stellar population of a given $\tau$ and $Z$ in a given volume, the number (and of course mass) distributions of both the in situ formed and the migrated stars are determined by only the universal:

  • IMF
  • stellar evolution process

For mono-age and mono-metallicity populations, there is no need to impose assumptions on the SFH, the chemical enrichment history, and the kinematical dynamical history

Determination of Complete Volume

Define a complete volume:

where $D$ is the distance of the star, $m_r^B$ and $m_r^F$ are the bright and the faint limiting apparent magnitudes, respectively, min{$M_r^B$} and max{$M_r^F$} are the minimal bright and the maximal faint limiting absolute magnitudes for stars of all populations (age and metallicity) of concern, respectively, $A_r^B$ and $A_r^F$ are the $r$-band interstellar extinctions at the near and the farther side of the complete distance, respectively.

Some Details

2D density map in the disk $R-Z$ plane:

$0.1 \times 0.05$ kpc

$0.05 \times 0.025$ kpc

Stellar Mass Density at the Solar Radius

An estimate of the midplane disk stellar mass density at the solar radius, average measurements within 7.8 $<R<$ 8.2 kpc and $\vline Z \vline<$ 50 pc.

Star Formation History of the Disk

$\sum_{\mathrm{ini}}^{*}$ is the initial stellar mass formed in a given time span $\Delta t$.

item.title: MySQL笔记 -03
item.description: where 条件查询

item.title: MySQL笔记 -02
item.description:
数据库的基本操作

查看当前DB: show databases;
添加DB: create database gc;
删除DB: drop database gc;

数据类型

数据库组成结构

创建数据表

1
2
3
4
5
6
7

create table account(
  id bigint(20),
  createTime datetime,
  ip varchar(255),
  brief text,
  gender int(11),
)

删除数据表

1

drop table account;

给数据表添加或删除列

增加列：alter table [table_name] add [column_name] [data_type] [not null] [default]
eg: alter table account add c1 int(11) not null default 1; (列不为空，且用1填充)

删除列：alter table [table_name] drop [column_name]

修改某个数据列的名字或者数据类型

  • 修改列信息 alter table [table_name] change [old_column_name] [new_column_name] [data_type] 如果只修改列的data_type，保持old & new column_name相同即可

  • 修改表名 alter table [table_name] rename [new_table_name]
    eg: alter table account rename newaccount;

查看或者插入表数据

  • 查看 
    1
2

    select * from table_name;
select col_1,col_2,... from table_name;
  • 插入 
    1
2

    insert into [table_name] values(val_1,val_2...)
insert into [table_name] (col_1,col_2...) values(val_1,val_2)

    eg:

    1
2

    insert into book values(1,'t hah','content');
insert into book(title) values('titile1');

item.title: MySQL笔记 -01
item.description:
Intro

SQL is the standardized language used to access the database.

MySQL is a database management system that allows you to manage relational databases. It is open source software backed by Oracle. It means you can use MySQL without paying a dime. Also, if you want, you can change its source code to suit your needs.

MySQL是一种关联数据库管理系统，关联数据库将数据保存在不同的表中，而不是将所有数据放在一个大仓库内，这样就增加了速度并提高了灵活性。 MySQL所使用的 SQL 语言是用于访问数据库的最常用标准化语言。MySQL采用了双授权政策，它分为社区版和商业版，由于其体积小、速度快、总体拥有成本低，尤其是开源这一特点，一般中小型网站的开发都选择MySQL作为网站数据库。由于其社区版的性能卓越，配合PHP和Apache可组成良好的开发环境。

MySQL在Mac下的安装和配置

  1. 给root用户添加密码
    /usr/local/mysql/bin/mysqladmin -u root -p password root
  2. 通过终端连接server
    /usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -u root -p
  3. 通过终端启动或者关闭mysql

配置文件路径系统

Linux: /etc/my.cnf
Mac: /usr/local/mysql/my.cnf

修改配置文件

1
2
3
4
5
6

[client]  
default-character-set=utf8

[mysqld]
character-set-server=utf8
default-storage-engine=INNODB

重启Mysql

Linux(CentOS): /etc/init.d/mysqld restart
Mac: sudo /Library/StartupItems/MySQLCOM/MYSQLCOM restart

item.title: Hello 2019
item.description:
Before 2019

New York is 3 hours ahead of California,
but it doesn’t make California slow.
Someone graduated at the age of 22,
but waited 5 years before securing a good job.
Someone became a CEO at 25,
and died at 50.
While another became a CEO at 50,
and lived to 90 years.
Someone is still single,
while someone else got mariied.
Obama retires at 55,
but DTrump starts at 70.
Everyone is runing their own RACE, in their own TIME.
Don’t envy them or mock them.
They are in their TIME ZONE, and you are in yours.
Life is about waiting for the right moment to act.
So relax, you’re not late or early.
You are very much on TIME,
and in your TIME ZONE destiny set up for you.

正文

在雁栖湖修了一门计算机学院的课Advanced Software Engineering，我是软件的门外汉，Software Engineering对我来说完全是一种陌生的领域，虽然课上很迷糊，但是也用了全新的视角来接触新的知识，对我自己来说也是非常难得和珍贵的体验。

大学时候能接触到的厉害的人大多数是Scientist，也难得有机会去接触真正的Engineer，在这个魔幻的时代，Engineering比Science也更接地气，在我看来也没有孰高孰低之分，完全是在不同的领域有自己的贡献，这门课最后的Project是用MVC的架构做一个Ruby on Rails的SaaS应用，其实这些软件开发的方式和方法在我看来也都是前所未有的陌生，但是好奇心驱使我学习和了解，谈不上精通，但是也大致弄清楚了开发的架构和脉络。这门课最后的作业是交一个Ruby on Rails的应用，由于几个组员也都不是专业学计算机或者软件的，我们简单地做了个旅行博客，具体项目在这里。

后来我找到了大名鼎鼎的Clean Blog，这是一个基于Bootstrap的模版，然后看见大学时候的学长Mingjie’s Blog,根据他的博客找到了Hux的Project，开心地fork并且终于搭建起了属于自己的blog。

一点感想

谈不上情怀和理想，每个人其实都是普通人，想大多数想相同的事情，也大多数在生活的路上，所以作为19年的开篇文章，也希望还会成为一个更想成为的自己，无论今后的路怎么选择，会无悔吧。
